title: "editor.formatOnSave": true
content:
"editor.formatOnSave": true
}
```
Adjust `opacity` (0 < value ≤ 1) to taste; 0.80–0.88 usually gives readable glass without haziness. Disable frameless initially—only enable if window chrome clashes with vibrancy.

**If You Need Slight Blur Without Extra Extensions**
Some vibrancy forks expose `"vscode_vibrancy.blurRadius"`; if available set modest value (e.g. 12–18). If not, rely on the system blur.

**Optional Enhancement Without Heavy Extensions**
- Accent gradients: you can add a subtle top border using `"window.titleBarStyle": "custom"` (already default in Insiders).
- Background subtle tint: Use `workbench.colorCustomizations` `editor.background` with 8‑digit hex (alpha) only if the vibrancy extension supports compositing; else leave default.

**Safe Removal Commands**
```bash
code-insiders --uninstall-extension johnpapa.vscode-peacock || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension drcika.apc-extension || true
code-insiders --uninstall-extension brandonkirbyson.vscode-animations || true
